## Changes

## Validation Commands

```bash
pnpm -r lint
pnpm -r typecheck
pnpm -r test
pnpm -r build
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue or rationale included
- [ ] Lint/typecheck/test completed locally
- [ ] QA 1st pass (requirement coverage) completed
- [ ] QA 2nd pass (functional happy/failure path) completed
- [ ] QA 3rd pass (regression) completed
- [ ] API QA completed
- [ ] UI QA completed (all touched pages; screenshots captured where needed)
- [ ] Docs updated (README/README.en/ADR/ops/api when needed)
- [ ] No secrets or private/vendor-only assets added
- [ ] Security/privacy review completed (no sensitive logs, keys, or PII leakage)
- [ ] `git diff` reviewed for accidental rename/delete or unrelated changes
- [ ] QA artifacts stored under `docs/qa/runs/<run-id>/` and path linked in PR
- [ ] Breaking changes clearly described
